name: LegalPath — Case Builder
description: Self-contained legal case builder with document analysis, ADA/ERISA/disability guidance, and legal document generator. © 2025 Paul Adcock — Patent Pending.
author: Paul Adcock (paul.dev.co@outlook.com)
features: Document analysis engine (38 clause rules, 10 gap checks, 8 loophole detectors)
ADA violation detector with federal statute citations
Medical misconduct detector for capacity certification challenges
Social Security SSDI/SSI application and appeal guidance
Copyright and patent filing guidance (USA, Illinois, International PCT)
32+ real court cases against Syncreon/DP World with direct links
Legal document generator (demand letters, EEOC charges, appeals)
Quick email buttons for HR, Lincoln Financial, SSA, and doctors
Case Assistant chatbot for action plan building
Self-advocate guide with legal term translator and rights cheat sheet
100% local — no server, no cloud, IndexedDB secure storage
